featured_reviews.author: Cheryl Collins
featured_reviews.text:
Exceptional Service from Start to Finish

The team at Anderson Heating and Air provided outstanding service from beginning to end. My husband and I would like to personally thank Tammy in Customer Service, along with the Service and Installation Team Joseph, Carlos, Joe, and Eddie for a job truly well done. Each of you went above and beyond our expectations, paying attention to the small things that made a big difference.

What stood out most was the consistent level of respect, transparency, care, and cleanliness shown in our home. From day one, it was clear that everyone knew their role, worked seamlessly as a team, and completed the project ahead of schedule.

We were truly blessed to participate in a program that allowed our mobile home to become more energy efficient through proper weatherization and the installation of a brand-new, complete Heating and Air system. After enduring several seasons of extreme heat and freezing cold temperatures due to poor installation, the difference was noticeable immediately—literally from the first day.

Thank you, Anderson Heating and Air, for helping us achieve a safer, more comfortable, and energy-efficient home 😊.

Forever Grateful 🙏🏾
The Collins Home 🏡
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you so much for your kind words, Cheryl. We’re thrilled Tammy, Joseph, Carlos, Joe, and Eddie provided respectful, transparent, and clean service and completed the project ahead of schedule. It’s wonderful to hear the weatherization and new HVAC made your mobile home noticeably more comfortable and energy-efficient from day one. We’re honored to have been part of this program and grateful for the opportunity to serve the Collins home. If you need anything in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out.

featured_reviews.author: Terry Johnson
featured_reviews.text: Trevor was great! We had a problem with strange odors in out HVAC system. His expertise really came through in tracing the possible causes of the problem, providing temporary corrections, and suggestions for preventing future issues. Pricing was clear before any work was performed, and he provided several options for permanent corrections/upgrades, without providing in "upselling". He worked unhurried and with minimal disruption to the household. His communication skills abd demeanor were excellent and reflect well on the company as a whole. Anderson Is a locally owned  and operated, so if you are looking to support a local business, I would not hesitate to call Anderson for all your heating and cooling needs.
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you, Terry, for the thoughtful review and recommendation. We're pleased Trevor could identify the odor source, provide clear pricing and options, and leave your home with minimal disruption. We’ll share your kind words with him and the rest of our team. We appreciate your support of our locally owned business and look forward to helping with any future heating and cooling needs.

featured_reviews.author: Karren Bennett
featured_reviews.text: Braden and Keith did a wonderful job very respectful and hard workers cleaned up well behind their cell explained how the system works and instructed to call them With any questions that might arise. They showed up on time as scheduled and there was also two other gentlemen that came on the first day and I’m sorry I don’t remember their names but everyone from this company was wonderful to work with
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you, Karren, for the wonderful review. We’re so glad Braden, Keith, and the rest of the crew were respectful, hardworking, punctual, and left the area clean. We appreciate you noting that they explained the system and will share your kind words with the team. Please call us anytime if you have questions or need anything else.

featured_reviews.author: Mary Berryman
featured_reviews.text: Keith Underwood was a a very professional young man. He was also very knowledgeable. He answered all my questions! Will use Anderson heating and air again if I have any problems!
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you, Mary, for the wonderful review. We're thrilled Keith provided professional, knowledgeable service and answered all your questions. We appreciate your trust in Anderson Heating and Air and look forward to helping you again whenever you need us.

featured_reviews.author: Gloria Leonard
featured_reviews.text: Josh and Keith did a fantastic job with my airconditioner. Very professional, knowledable about what they were doing. I am very satisfied with a job that was well done by these gentlemen . They kept me updated every step of the way about what they were doing.
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you so much for your kind review, Gloria. We're thrilled Josh and Keith provided professional, knowledgeable service and kept you informed every step of the way. We appreciate you recognizing their hard work and are glad you're satisfied with the results. If you need anything else with your air conditioner, please contact us anytime.

featured_reviews.author: Michael Holbrook
featured_reviews.text: Careful diagnosis of problem, and explanation of options to correct were discussed first. After selection work was carried out immediately to repair system refrigerant leakage and restore heating to house. I knew what was happening during the entire process, and pricing was fair.  Great service visit!
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you, Michael, for the kind review and for noting our thorough diagnosis and clear explanation of repair options. We're glad we could quickly repair the refrigerant leak, restore your heating, and keep you informed throughout the process. If you need anything else or have questions in the future, please give us a call — we appreciate your business.

featured_reviews.author: Debbie Nesbitt
featured_reviews.text: We have never used anyone but Anderson Heating and air. They are the best. Today, we needed them again. They were very prompt in responding.  The technician was so nice and friendly.  He asked several questions so he would know where to begin. He quickly diagnosed the problem. He gave me several options to fix the issue.  I have always trusted what they say is wrong. They have never tried to pressure me into buying or replacing stuff that I didn't need. He wasn't able to fix it today but he did order the parts. He was able to get it working enough to get us through the cold weather that is heading our way for the next few days.
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you so much, Debbie, for your continued trust and loyalty to Anderson Heating, Air & Insulation. We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. We’re glad our team was able to respond promptly, walk you through your options, and get your system running well enough to keep you comfortable during the cold weather. Providing honest recommendations and dependable service is very important to us, and it means a lot to hear that you feel confident in our work. Thank you again for choosing us.

featured_reviews.author: Amanda Johnson
featured_reviews.text: Excellent customer service they was very friendly and helpful I think they did a awesome job. Communication was great and I love their work ethic.. and no mess left behind.. they work good together.
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you for your wonderful feedback, Amanda! We're thrilled to hear that you had a great experience with our team and appreciated their friendly service and professionalism. It's fantastic to know that our communication and work ethic made a positive impact. We always strive to leave the area tidy and clean. Your support means a lot to us!

featured_reviews.author: Kendra Hull
featured_reviews.text:
Tammy was very nice she made sure to keep me in the loop about my scheduled appointment, and all correspondence with the techs day before and day of service.

The technicians- Greg Mills and his son Russell Mills we’re above and beyond professional, they arrived 30 minutes earlier than the expected scheduled appointment time, they were very kind , courtesy, friendly throughout the entire process. They were also extremely helpful with all my questions regarding the new equipment, and very knowledgeable about the process, and products they were insulating. They took pride in their work and made sure everything worked properly before leaving. They also showed me how to work the wifi thermostat Greg installed step by step to make sure I didn’t have any issues, concerns, or problems with it. I am very much happy with my purchase and would highly recommend Anderson Heating , Air & Insulation for all your home heating/air systems needs or upgrades.
featured_reviews.owner_response:
Thank you so much, Kendra, for your wonderful review! We’re thrilled to hear that Tammy took great care of you and kept you updated throughout the process. Greg and Russell will be happy to hear your kind words as well. They take a lot of pride in their work, and we’re glad it showed through in your experience.

We’re also happy to know you’re enjoying your new equipment and that the thermostat walkthrough was helpful. Your recommendation means a lot to our team. If you ever need anything in the future, we’re always here to help.

Thank you again for choosing Anderson Heating, Air & Insulation!

featured_reviews.author: Kendra Hull
featured_reviews.text:
Tammy was very nice she made sure to keep me in the loop about my scheduled appointment, and all correspondence with the techs day before and day of service.

The technicians- Greg Mills and his son Russell Mills we’re above and beyond professional, they arrived 30 minutes earlier than the expected scheduled appointment time, they were very kind , courtesy, friendly throughout the entire process. They were also extremely helpful with all my questions regarding the new equipment, and very knowledgeable about the process, and products they were insulating. They took pride in their work and made sure everything worked properly before leaving. They also showed me how to work the wifi thermostat Greg installed step by step to make sure I didn’t have any issues, concerns, or problems with it. I am very much happy with my purchase and would highly recommend Anderson Heating , Air & Insulation for all your home heating/air systems needs or upgrades.
featured_reviews.owner_response:
Thank you so much, Kendra, for your wonderful review! We’re thrilled to hear that Tammy took great care of you and kept you updated throughout the process. Greg and Russell will be happy to hear your kind words as well. They take a lot of pride in their work, and we’re glad it showed through in your experience.

We’re also happy to know you’re enjoying your new equipment and that the thermostat walkthrough was helpful. Your recommendation means a lot to our team. If you ever need anything in the future, we’re always here to help.

Thank you again for choosing Anderson Heating, Air & Insulation!

featured_reviews.author: santesha battle
featured_reviews.text: They came into the house and introduced their selves and explain to me everything that they were going to do. As they were going through the process of fixing the heat and the air they explained to me throughout the process everything they were doing. They also explained to me how to work the thermostat and I really do appreciate them they are good hard workers. Want to give a special thanks to Keith and Brayden for their hard work and making sure everything was running smooth. The house feels better already.
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you so much, Santesha, for taking the time to share your experience! We’re happy to hear that Keith and Brayden took great care of you and made sure everything was explained clearly throughout the process. We truly appreciate your kind words and are glad your home is feeling more comfortable already. Thank you for trusting us with your heating and air needs!

featured_reviews.author: Anita Celeste Parker
featured_reviews.text: Trevor Jones to the rescue once again! He was able to diagnose and repair our 27-year-old unit last December and was able to fix a different issue with the unit today. He is always prompt, knowledgeable, courteous, honest, helpful, and efficient. Trevor goes above and beyond! We are thankful to have him as our technician when needed, and we would gladly recommend his services to others.
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you so much, Anita, for the wonderful feedback! We’re lucky to have Trevor on our team, and it’s great to hear how much his expertise and dedication have made a difference for you. We truly appreciate your trust over the years and your recommendation means the world to us.

featured_reviews.author: Patsy Martin
featured_reviews.text: I recently had the pleasure of experiencing the exceptional service of Carlo, Ruben, and Eddie for my home weatherization. They arrived when expected, work diligently, very polite and left everything very clean. The technicians were very knowledgeable and professional. Excellent service from beginning to end. Thank you !! I would like to give high praises to Carlo and Keith. They                                                                                                                                came back to my house a second time for a different project. They did some work in the my bathroom , install insulation and etc. these guys done a wonderful job. With my first project and first review, I failed to mention Keith who did an  excellent job with my AC unit, clean the coil and etc. John Anderson is blessed to have technicians, that is dedicated and passionate about their job, also they are willing to go beyond and above to make share that the consumer is satisfied. Thank you all for a great team.
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you for your wonderful feedback, Patsy! We’re thrilled to hear that Carlo, Ruben, and Eddie provided you with exceptional service during your home weatherization. Their professionalism and dedication to cleanliness are truly commendable. Your satisfaction is our top priority, and we appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. We look forward to serving you again in the future!

featured_reviews.author: Jesse Regalado
featured_reviews.text:
Anderson heating and air installed two mini splits in my house.
They took approximately  2 hours to install them. They cleaned after themselves and hauled off my old window units.
They made sure I understood how to use the new units and left behind the user manuals.
My home is nice and cool, now.
I appreciate the level of commitment, speed, and professionalism they took in installing these two units.
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you for your fantastic review, Jesse! We're thrilled to hear that you were pleased with the installation of your mini splits and that our team was efficient and professional throughout the AC installation process in Trion, GA. We always strive to ensure our customers feel informed and satisfied with their new units. Your comfort is our priority, and we're glad your home is now cool and comfortable. We appreciate your kind words and look forward to serving you again in the future!

featured_reviews.author: Steve Sheppard
featured_reviews.text: Our a/c went out yesterday afternoon. I called Anderson's and spoke with Kate. Very pleasant and helpful. She had Trever here at 8am the next morning. Trevor is super professional and friendly. He explained everything with us and gave us several options for fixing our issues. When we decided which option we wanted he got to work immediately and fixed everything. Awesome experience. Thanks John for having such wonderful employees!
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you for your fantastic review, Steve! We're thrilled to hear that Kate and Trevor provided you with excellent service during your AC repair in Calhoun, GA and got your system fixed so quickly. Your kind words about our team mean a lot to us, and we strive to ensure each customer has a positive experience. We appreciate your business and look forward to serving you again in the future!

featured_reviews.author: Sharon Samuels
featured_reviews.text:
Keith and Ruben were so professional, respectful and same time made my family felt as if were there only customer.
I am so satisfied with h their service and personalities. Recommend 💯
featured_reviews.owner_response: Sharon, thank you so much for your wonderful feedback! We’re thrilled to hear that Keith and Ruben provided you with professional and respectful service during your AC installation and home weatherization project in College Park, GA. Our goal is always to make every customer feel like our only customer, and it’s great to know they made you and your family feel that way. We truly appreciate your recommendation and look forward to serving you again in the future!

featured_reviews.author: Bill Hodge
featured_reviews.text: Great job! Greg & his son showed up early & knocked it out! Very knowledgeable & nice guys, enjoyed having them work on my home, highly recommended if you want it done right 👍🏼
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you so much, Billy, for the awesome 5-star review! We're glad to hear that Greg and Russel made a great impression and got the job done right. It’s always our goal to provide top-quality service with a personal touch. Whether it’s AC installation or AC repair in Waleska, GA, we’re here to help. We truly appreciate your recommendation and look forward to serving you again!

featured_reviews.author: Tamara Garwood
featured_reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of experiencing exceptional service from Josh, Joe, and Eddie, of Anderson Heating Air and insulation & I can’t recommend them highly enough! From the moment they arrived, their professionalism and dedication were evident. They even went the extra mile by providing us with a window unit to ensure we stayed comfortable while we wait for the replacement of our main unit.

Their commitment to customer satisfaction truly set them apart. They understood how crucial it was for us to have a temporary unit, especially during the hot summer days. Their quick response and proactive approach were life-savers!

I cannot thank Josh, Joe, and Eddie enough for their incredible service. Anderson Heating Air and insulation are the absolute best in the business! If you're in need of HVAC service, look no further. You won’t be disappointed!
featured_reviews.owner_response:
Thank you so much, Tamara, for your amazing review! We're thrilled to hear that Josh, Joe, and Eddie delivered the exceptional service you experienced. Going the extra mile—like providing a temporary window unit—is just one of the ways we aim to support our customers in Douglasville, GA, especially during those hot summer days.

Your kind words mean the world to us! At Anderson Heating, Air & Insulation, we take pride in offering top-quality AC installation and home weatherization services to keep our customers comfortable year-round. We truly appreciate your recommendation and look forward to being your trusted HVAC team anytime you need us.

featured_reviews.author: jesse regalado
featured_reviews.text:
The original guys that came out to my home had some issues putting in an exhaust fan. My bathroom is an add on built in the 1960’s. It doesn’t have a crawl space. Once the owner was made aware of the problem, the owner and an employee (Kevin) came out to my home and inspected it. Upon inspection they found a way to put the exhaust fan in my bathroom. They rewired the fan. Now,  the light and the fan have separated switches.
They cleaned up their work area with a shop vac and fixed the hole in my ceiling where they originally put the exhaust fan.
They did a phenomenal job.
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you for the kind review, Jesse. We're glad we were able to get this exhaust fan installation working for you and that you are happy with the end result.

featured_reviews.author: Trevor Parker
featured_reviews.text: We requested Trevor's services again to troubleshoot the needs of our old unit and make repairs to get it back in working condition. As always, he was very prompt, professional, courteous, knowledgeable, and successful with the repairs. He cleaned the years of debris out of the unit as well to maximize its potential. We recommend him and will gladly use his services again in the future. See pictures of the dirt and debris lodged in the unit and the cleaned version.
featured_reviews.owner_response: Thank you so much for the fantastic 5-star review! We're thrilled to hear that Trevor provided excellent service during your AC repair in Calhoun, GA. It's great to know that he was able to diagnose the issue quickly and get everything working perfectly. We truly appreciate your kind words about his professionalism, knowledge, and patience. We're so glad you’ll be using our services again in the future!
